summary: Reverse shell and host beacon to 103.27.109.184 on module load
details: index.js (declared as the package main) executes a top-level IIFE that runs on every require/import of the package. The IIFE spawns /bin/sh and /bin/bash via child_process.spawn, opens TCP sockets to 103.27.109.184 on ports 8888 and 8889, and pipes the shell's stdin/stdout/stderr through the socket, giving the operator of that endpoint an interactive remote shell on the installer's host. The same code issues an HTTP GET to http://103.27.109.184:9999/pwned-module-<hostname> with os.hostname() interpolated into the URL path, beaconing the installer's identity to the same endpoint. The package advertises itself as a DevOps utility node for n8n; the shipped code implements a reverse shell rather than any n8n functionality.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
